rationale.fidelity: Correctly preserves the production decisions, constraints, feasible integer set, and cost objective while treating runtime solely as a computational outcome.
rationale.managerial_framing: States the plausible deadline, cadence, scale, and incumbent pathways but correctly cannot make one concrete because none is supplied; the actual managerial trigger and counterfactual remain underdeveloped.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No defensible literature relationship is requested or claimed, so this conditional category is not applicable.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Accurately scopes faster runtime to the supplied benchmarks and rejects universal speed, lower true optimum, realized profit, and unsupported causal value.
rationale.prose_clarity: Clear and careful, though the diagnostic layers repeat the same missing-pathway conclusion several times.
rationale.overall: A correct computational framing and strong diagnosis of the absent profit pathway; lower managerial specificity is appropriate to the missing case evidence.
